title: Meisha Harley Pattern Espresso Spoons Set of 12, 18/0 Stainless Steel Mirror Finished Coffee Spoons, Luxuly Cutlery Kitchen Tableware - Silver
features: ☕Durable & Solid: Made of 18/0 stainless steel, strong anti rust, the coffee spoon set provides long-lasting performance.

☕Elegant design: Sleek and classy looking, smooth surface and mirror polish makes these spoons always keep shining. Modern flatware would match well with your existing cutlery and elevate your everyday meals into a fine dining experience.

☕Multi-function Use: Suitable for everyday use or special occasions. Perfect for cafe, bistro, restaurant, bar, home, party use. Use for coffee, appetizers, perfect baby or toddler spoon, or any other need of a small utensil.
☕Perfect size: length: 11.6cm/4.6 inches; weight: 12.1g. Comfortable handle and convenient for daily use. Easily matches with existing flatware.
☕【Worry-Free Guarantee】: Your satisfaction is our highest priority, if you have any questions, please feel free to contact us. We will help to meet your satisfaction.
description: Meisha 12-Piece Coffee Spoons for Home and Restaurant Exquisite craft Smooth edge with no rough spots, shiny finish surface machining, anti rust and non toxic, medium weight and proper thickness ensure comfortable in use. Durable & Easy to Wash Made from 18/0 stainless steel flatware is easily clean up in the dishwasher, and last for long use indefinitely. Modern and elegant design Simple and classic look, mirror finish make your tableware different. The superior quality makes this silverware set suitable for kitchens, restaurants, events, and everyday meals. Features Material: Premium Stainless Steel Color: Silver Package List: 12 coffee spoons Length: 4.6inch (11.7cm), Weight: 0.43oz/unit (12.1g) Warm tips: 1.Do not leave your silverware sitting in water, as soaking can permanently damage the metal, and please make sure your cutlery is completely dry before you store it. 2.Please do not use steel wool, scouring pads or sharp objects to avoid scratches.
